text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 15 

CLM_ADMSN_DT 

LABEL: Claim Admission Date 

DESCRIPTION: On an institutional claim, the date the beneficiary was admitted to the hospital, skilled nursing facility, 
or religious non-medical health care institution. 

For home health services, this is the date care started for the HH services reported on the encounter 
record. 

SHORT NAME: CLM_ADMSN_DT 

LONG NAME: CLM_ADMSN_DT
